panels.description: Operator actions: trigger a reindex via the realm-server. Live blast-radius (pending / in-flight / oldest pending) is fetched from boxel_index/jobs every refresh; the reindex buttons disable themselves while an indexing job is already in flight for the selected realm. Each click POSTs with `Authorization: Bearer ${grafana_secret}` (substituted from SSM at apply time, CS-10929).

elements.title: Realm
elements.tooltip: Pick the realm to operate on. Selection is mirrored into the URL (?var-full_index_realm=…) so links to this dashboard preselect a realm.

elements.title: Pending jobs (this realm)
elements.tooltip: Indexing jobs queued for the selected realm with no live worker reservation.

elements.title: In-flight (this realm)
elements.tooltip: Indexing jobs currently held by a worker for the selected realm. While > 0, the per-realm reindex button is disabled.

elements.title: Pending full-reindex
elements.tooltip: Number of `full-reindex` orchestration jobs currently queued or running. While > 0, the "Reindex ALL realms" button is disabled to prevent stacking duplicate full reindexes.

elements.title: Oldest pending
elements.tooltip: Age of the oldest pending indexing job for the selected realm. Sustained age usually means workers are saturated or stuck.

elements.title: Last reindex (this realm)
elements.tooltip: Most recent from-scratch-index for the selected realm. Reads from the jobs / job_progress tables (CS-10930).
POST /_grafana-reindex?realm=${full_index_realm}. Disabled while an indexing job is in flight for this realm.
POST /_grafana-full-reindex. Disabled while a `full-reindex` orchestration job is already pending or running. Long-running — every realm is reindexed.

targets.rawSql:
WITH realm_jobs AS (
  SELECT j.*
    FROM jobs j
   WHERE j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index')
     AND COALESCE(j.args->>'realmURL','') = '${full_index_realm}'
),
realm_pending AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS n,
         MIN(j.created_at) AS oldest_created
    FROM realm_jobs j
    LEFT JOIN job_reservations jr ON j.id = jr.job_id
      AND jr.completed_at IS NULL AND jr.locked_until > NOW()
   WHERE j.status = 'unfulfilled' AND jr.id IS NULL
),
realm_in_flight AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM realm_jobs j
    JOIN job_reservations jr ON j.id = jr.job_id
      AND jr.completed_at IS NULL AND jr.locked_until > NOW()
   WHERE j.finished_at IS NULL
),
pending_full_reindex AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM jobs j
   WHERE j.job_type = 'full-reindex'
     AND j.finished_at IS NULL
),
last_reindex AS (
  SELECT j.id, j.created_at AS started, j.finished_at AS finished,
         j.status,
         COALESCE(jp.files_completed, 0) AS files_completed,
         COALESCE(jp.total_files, 0) AS total_files
    FROM realm_jobs j
    LEFT JOIN job_progress jp ON jp.job_id = j.id
   WHERE j.job_type = 'from-scratch-index'
   ORDER BY j.created_at DESC
   LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  '${full_index_realm}' AS realm,
  COALESCE((SELECT n FROM realm_pending), 0) AS pending,
  COALESCE((SELECT n FROM realm_in_flight), 0) AS in_flight,
  COALESCE((SELECT n FROM pending_full_reindex), 0) AS pending_full_reindex,
  CASE
    WHEN (SELECT oldest_created FROM realm_pending) IS NULL THEN '—'
    ELSE TO_CHAR(NOW() - (SELECT oldest_created FROM realm_pending), 'HH24:MI:SS')
      || ' (since ' || TO_CHAR((SELECT oldest_created FROM realm_pending) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') || ' UTC)'
  END AS oldest_pending_human,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT
       CASE
         WHEN finished IS NULL AND started IS NOT NULL THEN
           'running — ' || files_completed || '/' || NULLIF(total_files,0) || ' files, started ' || TO_CHAR(started AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') || ' UTC'
         WHEN finished IS NOT NULL THEN
           INITCAP(COALESCE(status::text,'finished')) || ' at ' || TO_CHAR(finished AT TIME ZONE 'UTC', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') || ' UTC'
         ELSE COALESCE(status::text,'unknown')
       END
     FROM last_reindex),
    'never'
  ) AS last_reindex_status;
SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(url, '^https?://', '') AS label, url AS value FROM realm_registry WHERE kind IN ('bootstrap', 'source') ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Operator Actions

panels.description: Indexing jobs waiting for a worker across all realm-server tasks (CS-10930). Reconciles with `SELECT count(*) FROM jobs WHERE status='unfulfilled' AND job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex')` minus those with an active reservation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS pending
  FROM jobs j
  LEFT JOIN job_reservations jr ON j.id = jr.job_id
    AND jr.completed_at IS NULL AND jr.locked_until > NOW()
 WHERE j.status = 'unfulfilled'
   AND j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex')
   AND jr.id IS NULL;

panels.title: Pending Indexing Jobs

panels.description: Indexing jobs currently held by a worker (live reservation, finished_at NULL).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS in_flight
  FROM jobs j
  JOIN job_reservations jr ON j.id = jr.job_id
    AND jr.completed_at IS NULL AND jr.locked_until > NOW()
 WHERE j.finished_at IS NULL
   AND j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex');

panels.title: In-flight Indexing Jobs

panels.description: Age of the oldest pending indexing job. Red after 5 minutes — sustained values here usually mean workers are saturated or stuck.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MIN(j.created_at))) AS oldest_pending_seconds
  FROM jobs j
  LEFT JOIN job_reservations jr ON j.id = jr.job_id
    AND jr.completed_at IS NULL AND jr.locked_until > NOW()
 WHERE j.status = 'unfulfilled'
   AND j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex')
   AND jr.id IS NULL;

panels.title: Oldest Pending

panels.description: Indexing-job flow rates. Three series — `arrived` (jobs queued), `started` (a worker reserved them), `completed` (jobs.finished_at set). Bucketed by 30s. A persistent gap between arrived and completed indicates worker saturation.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(j.created_at, '30s') AS time,
       COUNT(*) AS arrived
  FROM jobs j
 WHERE j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex')
   AND $__timeFilter(j.created_at)
 GROUP BY 1
 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(jr.created_at, '30s') AS time,
       COUNT(*) AS started
  FROM job_reservations jr
  JOIN jobs j ON j.id = jr.job_id
 WHERE j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex')
   AND $__timeFilter(jr.created_at)
 GROUP BY 1
 ORDER BY 1;

SELECT $__timeGroupAlias(j.finished_at, '30s') AS time,
       COUNT(*) AS completed
  FROM jobs j
 WHERE j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex')
   AND j.finished_at IS NOT NULL
   AND $__timeFilter(j.finished_at)
 GROUP BY 1
 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Indexing throughput (arrived / started / completed)

panels.description: Stocks of indexing jobs over time. `pending` = queued, no live reservation; `in_flight` = a worker has an open reservation; `completed` = cumulative finished. Bucketed at 1 minute over the panel's time range. Cost: O(buckets × indexing-jobs in window) per refresh — if this gets slow, switch to a snapshot/materialized table.

targets.rawSql:
WITH buckets AS (
  SELECT generate_series($__timeFrom()::timestamptz, $__timeTo()::timestamptz, '1 minute') AS bucket
),
indexing_jobs AS (
  SELECT j.id, j.created_at, j.finished_at,
    (SELECT MIN(jr.created_at) FROM job_reservations jr WHERE jr.job_id = j.id) AS first_started_at
   FROM jobs j
   WHERE j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex')
     AND j.created_at <= $__timeTo()::timestamptz
)
SELECT b.bucket AS time,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ij.created_at <= b.bucket
    AND (ij.first_started_at IS NULL OR ij.first_started_at > b.bucket)
    AND (ij.finished_at IS NULL OR ij.finished_at > b.bucket)) AS pending,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ij.first_started_at IS NOT NULL
    AND ij.first_started_at <= b.bucket
    AND (ij.finished_at IS NULL OR ij.finished_at > b.bucket)) AS in_flight,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ij.finished_at IS NOT NULL AND ij.finished_at <= b.bucket) AS completed
 FROM buckets b LEFT JOIN indexing_jobs ij ON TRUE
 GROUP BY b.bucket
 ORDER BY b.bucket;

panels.title: Pending vs in-flight vs completed (over time)

panels.description: One row per indexing job currently held by a worker (across all realm-server / worker tasks). `progress` and `current files` come from `job_progress` (CS-10930), populated by each realm-server's IndexingEventSink write-through. Click the realm cell to drill into the live activity feed.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  j.id AS job_id,
  RTRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(j.concurrency_group, '^indexing:https?://[^/]+/', ''), '/') AS realm,
  COALESCE(j.args->>'realmURL','') AS realm_url,
  j.job_type,
  COALESCE(jp.files_completed, 0) AS files_completed,
  COALESCE(jp.total_files, 0) AS total_files,
  CASE WHEN COALESCE(jp.total_files, 0) > 0
    THEN (jp.files_completed::float / jp.total_files) * 100
    ELSE 0
  END AS percent,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - jr.created_at)) AS elapsed_seconds,
  jr.created_at AS started_at,
  jr.worker_id,
  jr.id AS reservation_id
 FROM jobs j
 JOIN job_reservations jr ON jr.job_id = j.id
   AND jr.completed_at IS NULL AND jr.locked_until > NOW()
 LEFT JOIN job_progress jp ON jp.job_id = j.id
 WHERE j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index')
   AND j.finished_at IS NULL
 ORDER BY jr.created_at DESC;

panels.title: Active Indexing

panels.description: Per-realm aggregate of indexing-job state. `oldest_pending_seconds` red after 5 min flags realms whose backlog isn't draining.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  RTRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(COALESCE(j.args->>'realmURL',''), '^https?://[^/]+/', ''), '/') AS realm,
  COALESCE(j.args->>'realmURL','') AS realm_url,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE j.status = 'unfulfilled' AND jr.id IS NULL) AS pending,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE j.status = 'unfulfilled' AND jr.id IS NOT NULL) AS in_flight,
  MAX(j.finished_at) AS last_completed_at,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - MIN(j.created_at)
    FILTER (WHERE j.status = 'unfulfilled' AND jr.id IS NULL))) AS oldest_pending_seconds
 FROM jobs j
 LEFT JOIN job_reservations jr ON j.id = jr.job_id
   AND jr.completed_at IS NULL AND jr.locked_until > NOW()
 WHERE j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index')
 GROUP BY j.args->>'realmURL'
 ORDER BY pending DESC, in_flight DESC, last_completed_at DESC NULLS LAST
 LIMIT 200;

panels.title: Per-realm indexing status

value.title: Delete job ${__value.raw}
value.confirmation: Delete waiting job ${__value.raw}? This marks it as completed without running it.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 
  j.id, 
  j.priority, 
  j.job_type, 
  CASE 
    WHEN j.concurrency_group ~ '^indexing:https://[^/]+/.+' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(j.concurrency_group, '^indexing:https://[^/]+/', '') 
    WHEN j.concurrency_group ~ '^indexing:https://[^/]+/?$' THEN REGEXP_REPLACE(j.concurrency_group, '^indexing:https://', '') 
    ELSE j.concurrency_group 
  END AS concurrency_group, 
  j.status AS status, 
  j.created_at AS created_at, 


  -- Wait time in seconds
    CASE 
      WHEN jr.created_at IS NOT NULL 
        THEN EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (jr.created_at - j.created_at))
      ELSE 
        EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - j.created_at))
    END
    AS wait_seconds,
 j.id as job_id

FROM 
  jobs j
  
LEFT JOIN 
  job_reservations jr ON j.id = jr.job_id

WHERE
jr.job_id IS NULL AND j.status = 'unfulfilled' AND j.job_type IN ('from-scratch-index','incremental-index','full-reindex') 
  
ORDER BY 
  j.created_at ASC
LIMIT 500;

panels.title: Queued Indexing Jobs
panels.description: Indexing jobs (from-scratch-index, incremental-index) waiting on a worker. Same query as Job Queue → Waiting Jobs, narrowed to indexing job types.

list.definition: SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(url, '^https?://', '') AS __text, url AS __value FROM realm_registry WHERE kind IN ('bootstrap', 'source') ORDER BY 1;
list.label: Realm to Full Index
list.name: full_index_realm
list.query: SELECT REGEXP_REPLACE(url, '^https?://', '') AS __text, url AS __value FROM realm_registry WHERE kind IN ('bootstrap', 'source') ORDER BY 1;
